info.title: LINGO Phone Agent API
info.description:
The LINGO API allows you to programmatically deploy, configure, and interact with AI phone agents for small businesses. Each agent answers inbound calls 24/7, sends and receives SMS, maintains persistent caller memory via the Kirk memory system, and escalates to humans when needed.

Base URL: https://api.lingo-agent.ai/v1

All requests require Bearer token authentication. Obtain your API key from the LINGO dashboard at https://app.lingo-agent.ai.

tags.name: Agents
tags.description: Create, retrieve, and decommission phone agents

tags.name: Messaging
tags.description: Send messages to agents for agent-to-agent interaction

tags.name: Memory
tags.description: Caller memory powered by the Kirk memory system

post.description: Provisions a new LINGO phone agent tied to a business. The agent immediately begins answering inbound calls on the provided phone number. If the phone number is not already a LINGO-managed number, it will be ported or a new number will be provisioned depending on the `phone_number` value provided.

value.system_prompt: You are the friendly AI phone assistant for Tony's Pizzeria in San Francisco. You help customers place orders, check wait times, and answer questions about our menu. We are open Mon–Sat 11am–10pm and Sun 12pm–9pm. Our address is 425 Columbus Ave, SF. Always confirm the customer's order back to them before ending the call.

You are the AI receptionist for Bright Smiles Dental. You schedule appointments, confirm existing appointments, and answer general questions about our services. We accept Delta Dental and Blue Cross. New patients should be directed to arrive 15 minutes early. For dental emergencies, always escalate to a human immediately.

409.description: Phone number already assigned to another agent

example.message: The phone number +14155551234 is already assigned to agent agt_3bNp7kLmW2xQs5r

get.description: Returns a paginated list of all phone agents associated with the authenticated account.
Retrieves full details, current status, and usage statistics for a specific agent.

patch.description: Update one or more configuration fields on an existing agent. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.

delete.description: Permanently decommissions a phone agent. The agent will stop answering calls immediately. Call history, transcripts, and Kirk memory are preserved for 90 days before deletion. This action cannot be undone.

reason.description: Optional reason for decommissioning, stored for audit purposes

release_phone_number.description: If true, releases the phone number back to the carrier pool. If false, the number is held for 30 days and can be reassigned.

data_deletion_scheduled_at.description: When transcripts and memory will be permanently deleted (90 days)

post.summary: Send a message to an agent
post.description: Sends a text message to a LINGO agent for agent-to-agent interaction. The agent will process the message using its full system prompt and Kirk memory context and return a response. This endpoint is designed for programmatic agent orchestration — e.g., a booking agent passing context to LINGO before a call, or a CRM agent querying LINGO for caller intent. Messages sent via this endpoint do NOT initiate phone calls.

value.content: Customer John Smith (+14155559012) is about to call. He has a 3pm appointment on Nov 20 and may want to reschedule to the morning. His last visit was Oct 5. Please greet him by name and offer 9am or 10am on Nov 20.
Summarize the last 3 interactions with caller +13105557890 and rate their overall sentiment.

example.content: Context loaded. When John Smith calls, I will greet him by name, confirm his Nov 20 3pm appointment, and proactively offer the 9am or 10am slots. His last visit on Oct 5 involved a routine checkup — I'll reference that naturally if he mentions it.

get.summary: Get caller memory for an agent
get.description: Returns the Kirk memory store for an agent — a structured record of every caller the agent has interacted with, including preferences, history, sentiment, and any notes recorded during calls. Optionally filter by caller phone number.

parameters.name: caller_id
parameters.description: E.164 phone number to filter memory for a specific caller

preferences.notes: Prefers morning appointments. Allergic to penicillin. Mentioned daughter Emma.
Prefers Spanish. Has standing Thursday 2pm appointment.

delete.description: Permanently deletes all stored memory for a specific caller. Required for GDPR/CCPA right-to-erasure requests. Must include `caller_id` as a query parameter.

get.description: Returns paginated call and SMS transcripts for the agent, ordered newest-first. Each transcript includes the full conversation, detected intent, entities extracted (names, dates, addresses), sentiment, and whether escalation occurred.

parameters.name: caller_id
parameters.description: Filter transcripts for a specific caller

messages.content: Thank you for calling Bright Smiles Dental! This is LINGO, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi, I'd like to book a checkup for November 20th if you have anything in the morning.
Absolutely! We have 9am and 10am available on November 20th. Which would you prefer?
Perfect! I've noted the 9am slot on November 20th for a checkup. You'll receive a confirmation SMS shortly. Is there anything else I can help you with?

post.description: Updates the agent's system prompt, adds knowledge base entries, or adjusts behavioral settings. Changes take effect immediately for new calls. Ongoing calls are not affected.

update_hours.summary: Update business hours in system prompt

value.system_prompt: You are the AI assistant for Tony's Pizzeria. We are now open Mon–Sun 11am–11pm including holidays. Our new holiday special: 20% off all orders over $30 in December.
value.change_summary: Updated hours to 7 days/week and added December holiday promotion

knowledge_entries.question: Do you offer gluten-free options?
knowledge_entries.answer: Yes! We offer gluten-free crust for an additional $2. Please inform us of any allergies when ordering.

knowledge_entries.question: What are your delivery zones?
knowledge_entries.answer: We deliver within 5 miles of our Columbus Ave location. Delivery fee is $3.99, free for orders over $40.

example.change_summary: Updated hours to 7 days/week and added December holiday promotion

post.description: Temporarily pauses an agent. Inbound calls will be forwarded to the configured escalation number or voicemail. Useful for scheduled maintenance windows or when a human needs to take over temporarily.

resume_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime to automatically resume. If omitted, must resume manually.

forward_to.description: Forward calls to this number while paused. Defaults to escalation contact.

BearerAuth.description: API key obtained from the LINGO dashboard. Pass as `Authorization: Bearer <your-api-key>`.

business_name.description: Legal or trade name of the business

phone_number.description: E.164 format phone number. Use `+new` to provision a new LINGO number.

system_prompt.description: The agent's core instructions. Describe the business, tone, hours, capabilities, and any rules the agent must follow.

escalation_email.description: Email address that receives escalation notifications when the agent transfers to a human

plan.description: Subscription plan. `burner` ($9/mo): 60 min/mo, voice only. `starter` ($29/mo): 300 min/mo, voice + SMS. `pro` ($79/mo): unlimited*, voice + SMS + priority routing.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for the business (affects scheduling and time references in calls)

language.description: BCP 47 language tag for the agent's primary language

voice.description: TTS voice profile for the agent

escalation_phone.description: Phone number to transfer calls when escalation is triggered. If omitted, escalation is email-only.

escalation_triggers.description: Natural language phrases or topics that trigger human escalation

sms_enabled.description: Allow the agent to send and receive SMS (requires starter or pro plan)

voicemail_enabled.description: Record voicemail if call is not answered within 20 seconds

webhook_url.description: HTTPS URL to receive real-time event webhooks (call.started, call.ended, escalation.triggered, sms.received)

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value metadata attached to the agent (useful for CRM IDs, partner tracking, etc.)

status.description: `provisioning` is a transient state during initial setup (usually < 30s)

kirk_memory_id.description: Identifier for this agent's Kirk memory store

satisfaction_score.description: Average sentiment-derived satisfaction score across all calls (0–1)

role.description: `user` for a caller-perspective message; `system` for a privileged instruction injection

caller_id.description: If provided, the agent will load Kirk memory for this caller and incorporate it into its response

session_id.description: Optional session ID to continue a previous conversation thread

metadata.description: Arbitrary metadata (e.g., source agent ID, CRM record ID)

caller_memory_updated.description: Whether the agent updated Kirk memory based on this interaction

recording_url.description: Signed URL to the call recording MP3, valid for 7 days

system_prompt.description: Replace the agent's full system prompt. Omit to leave unchanged.

system_prompt_patch.description: Append or modify the system prompt without replacing it entirely. Useful for adding seasonal context.

knowledge_entries.description: FAQ-style knowledge entries added to the agent's retrieval store

escalation_triggers.description: Replace the full escalation triggers list

change_summary.description: Human-readable description of what was changed (stored in training history)

status.description: `applied` means live immediately. `queued` means the agent is mid-call and the update will apply when the call ends.

version.description: Monotonically increasing version number for this agent's instruction set

field.description: Field that caused validation error, if applicable

request_id.description: Unique request ID for support queries

BadRequest.description: Bad request — missing or invalid parameters

example.message: phone_number must be in E.164 format (e.g. +14155551234)
Invalid or expired API key. Generate a new key at https://app.lingo-agent.ai/settings/api

NotFound.description: Agent not found or not owned by this account

example.message: No agent found with ID agt_7xKp2mNqR4wBvL9s

UnprocessableEntity.description: Request was well-formed but failed business logic validation
